overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain trail toward a snow-capped peak under overcast skies, eventually stopping to survey the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail with stone retaining walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path bordered by stone walls and dense coniferous forest

entered.detail: moss-covered stone wall running along the right side of the path
dense pine and fir trees covering the left hillside
narrow winding dirt trail with scattered stones
large granite rock face visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow mountain trail enclosed by a stone wall on the right and dense coniferous forest on the left. The path winds through the forested terrain under an overcast sky, with moss-covered rocks and lush vegetation lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow approaching snow-capped peak

events.description: exiting the enclosed walled path into open mountain terrain with snow-capped peak becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the landscape opens up to reveal a massive snow-covered mountain in the distance

entered.detail: massive snow-covered mountain peak dominating the horizon ahead
ancient stone ruins and pillars alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wide mountain meadow as the stone wall ends, revealing a breathtaking view of a massive snow-capped peak ahead. Ancient stone ruins appear on the left side of the path as Geralt continues walking toward the distant mountain under grey skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine ridge trail with panoramic mountain views

events.description: path curves to the right offering expansive views of the forested valley and distant ocean horizon

agents.ego_description: ascending the mountain ridge trail with the snow peak growing larger and more detailed ahead

entered.detail: dense forest covering the valley slopes visible to the right
steep drop-off edge along the right side of the narrowing path

segments.scene_description: Walking along an exposed alpine ridge, the trail curves right revealing a steep cliff edge and panoramic views of the forested valley below. The snow-capped mountain looms larger ahead as the character ascends higher, with sparse vegetation and rocky terrain replacing the dense forest.

events.description: character stops walking and rotates 180 degrees to survey the landscape behind

agents.ego_description: halting at the mountain overlook and turning to face the camera, revealing the valley and ocean behind

entered.detail: distant blue ocean visible on the horizon beyond the forested valley
large boulder formation on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt stops at the mountain overlook and turns around, revealing his face and the expansive view behind him. The snow-capped mountain now appears to the left while the distant ocean horizon and forested valleys stretch out to the right, showcasing the dramatic altitude and panoramic vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a secluded forest path into an expansive alpine overlook. It begins with Geralt walking through a narrow passage enclosed by a stone wall and dense coniferous forest under an overcast sky. As the wall ends, the scene opens into a wide mountain meadow where ancient stone ruins appear and a massive snow-capped peak is revealed in the distance. The camera then follows the character along an exposed ridge that curves right, shifting from lush vegetation to rocky terrain as the trail reveals a steep cliff edge and a panoramic view of the valley below. Finally, Geralt stops at the overlook and turns around, shifting the perspective to showcase his face against a dramatic vista of the snow-capped mountain and the distant ocean horizon.
